user.title: GoodVibes Daemon
user.description: Connect to a GoodVibes daemon with SDK 0.25.11 Home Assistant surface enabled. The Home Assistant long-lived access token is configured in the daemon as surfaces.homeassistant.accessToken; this integration only stores the daemon URL, daemon bearer token, webhook secret, and event type.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the GoodVibes daemon.
error.invalid_auth: The daemon rejected the bearer token.
error.surface_missing: The daemon Home Assistant surface is not available. Enable featureFlags.homeassistant-surface and surfaces.homeassistant.enabled.

abort.already_configured: This GoodVibes daemon is already configured.
